challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
import secrets
import string


def generate_password():    
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols
challengeFiles.seed:
import secrets
import string


def generate_password():    
    # Define the possible characters for the password
    letters = string.ascii_letters
    digits = string.digits
    symbols = string.punctuation

    # Combine all characters
    all_characters = letters + digits + symbols

tests.text: Vaša funkcija za generate_password treba da primi parametar length.
tests.testString:
({ test: () => assert(runPython(`
    import inspect
    sig = str(inspect.signature(generate_password))
    sig == "(length)"
  `))
})

description: Tvoja funkcija za generate_password zahteva nekoliko parametara. Počnite dodavanjem parametra za length.
